//: PARTIAL-UPDATE demo. Demonstrates two key invariants of the import path:
//1: 1. Sparse records — only the channels listed are touched; di[2..15] keep their cache.
//2: 2. Sparse fields  — fields not present in a record keep their cached value.
//3: Send via:  ( printf 'AT+SET_CONFIG\n'; cat examples/config_partial.json; sleep 0.3 ) | nc localhost 5555
